Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class ListValidatorImpl<L extends List<E>,​E>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator<S,​C>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractCollectionValidator<ListValidator<L,​E>,​L,​E>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.ListValidatorImpl<L,​E>
Type Parameters:
L - the type of the list
E - the type of elements in the list
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleCollectionValidator<ListValidator<L,​E>,​L,​E>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<ListValidator<L,​E>,​L>, ListValidator<L,​E>
public final class ListValidatorImpl<L extends List<E>,​E>
extends AbstractCollectionValidator<ListValidator<L,​E>,​L,​E>
implements ListValidator<L,​E>
Default implementation of ListValidator.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors 
    Constructor Description
    ListValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, L actual, Pluralizer pluralizer)
    Creates a ListValidatorImpl with no validation failures.
    ListValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, L actual, Pluralizer pluralizer, List<ValidationFailure> failures)
    Creates a ListValidatorImpl with existing validation failures.

  • Method Summary

    Methods declared in class com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator

    getConfiguration, getName, getScope

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleCollectionValidator

    asArray, asArray, contains, contains, containsAll, containsAll, containsAny, containsAny, containsExactly, containsExactly, doesNotContain, doesNotContain, doesNotContainAll, doesNotContainAll, doesNotContainAny, doesNotContainAny, doesNotContainDuplicates, doesNotContainExactly, doesNotContainExactly, isEmpty, isNotEmpty, size, size

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectValidator

    asString, asString, getActual, getFailures, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Constructor Details

    • ListValidatorImpl

      public ListValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, L actual, Pluralizer pluralizer)
      Creates a ListValidatorImpl with no validation failures.
      Parameters:
      scope - the application configuration
      config - the instance configuration
      name - the name of the value
      actual - the actual value
      pluralizer - returns the singular or plural form of an element type
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if scope, config, name or pluralizer are null. If name is empty.

    • ListValidatorImpl

      public ListValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, L actual, Pluralizer pluralizer, List<ValidationFailure> failures)
      Creates a ListValidatorImpl with existing validation failures.
      Parameters:
      scope - the application configuration
      config - the instance configuration
      name - the name of the value
      actual - the actual value
      pluralizer - returns the singular or plural form of an element type
      failures - the list of validation failures
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if scope, config, name, pluralizer or failures are null. If name is empty.
